inline_comments.message: lets make these parameters configurable as well by extracting them into application/override yaml and the default values for these params can be the one you have it now
why you need to have the kafka-client dependency  in dependencyManagement? Would sdc-distribution-client dependency will have kafka-clients
if this "httpmime" dependency needed for sdc-distribution-client then it should be part of that no???
extract version this to properties as well
